import{useRef,useState}from"react";/**
 * ImageCapture
 * Works on both desktop (file browser) and mobile (camera OR gallery).
 *
 * On mobile:
 *   "Take photo"  → opens rear camera directly (capture="environment")
 *   "From gallery"→ opens photo library (no capture attribute)
 *
 * On desktop:
 *   Both buttons open the OS file browser.
 *   Desktop browsers ignore the capture attribute safely.
 */import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function ImageCapture(_ref){let{onImageSelected,disabled}=_ref;const cameraInputRef=useRef(null);const galleryInputRef=useRef(null);const[preview,setPreview]=useState(null);const[dragOver,setDragOver]=useState(false);const handleFile=file=>{if(!file||!file.type.startsWith("image/"))return;const url=URL.createObjectURL(file);setPreview(url);onImageSelected(file);};// Drag-and-drop (laptop users)
const handleDrop=e=>{e.preventDefault();setDragOver(false);handleFile(e.dataTransfer.files[0]);};const clearImage=()=>{setPreview(null);onImageSelected(null);if(cameraInputRef.current)cameraInputRef.current.value="";if(galleryInputRef.current)galleryInputRef.current.value="";};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"capture-wrapper",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{ref:cameraInputRef,type:"file",accept:"image/*",capture:"environment"/* rear camera on mobile */,onChange:e=>handleFile(e.target.files[0]),style:{display:"none"}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{ref:galleryInputRef,type:"file",accept:"image/*"/* no capture = gallery / file browser */,onChange:e=>handleFile(e.target.files[0]),style:{display:"none"}}),!preview?/*#__PURE__*//* ── Drop zone (shown before image selected) ── */_jsxs("div",{className:`drop-zone ${dragOver?"drag-over":""}`,onDragOver:e=>{e.preventDefault();setDragOver(true);},onDragLeave:()=>setDragOver(false),onDrop:handleDrop,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"drop-icon",children:"\uD83D\uDCF7"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"drop-title",children:"Upload or capture a leaf image"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"drop-sub",children:"Drag and drop here, or use the buttons below"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"btn-row",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn-primary",onClick:()=>cameraInputRef.current.click(),disabled:disabled,children:"Take photo"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn-secondary",onClick:()=>galleryInputRef.current.click(),disabled:disabled,children:"Choose from gallery"})]})]}):/*#__PURE__*//* ── Preview (shown after image selected) ── */_jsxs("div",{className:"preview-wrapper",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:preview,alt:"Selected leaf",className:"preview-img"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn-clear",onClick:clearImage,children:"Change image"})]})]});}
